title: Reworked Netherite Templates
description: A mod that changes and makes the netherite smithing templates craftable
body:
so im not sure about you but i REALLY didn't like the addition of smithing templates and how expensive they were to duplicate. so i added a crafting recipe so you can make them. you can still duplicate them but why would you when you have this mod.

i hade a video if you need more info
